name: Section 143(1) Intimation Analysis
description: Extracts key data from Income Tax Section 143(1) intimation notices for drafting a formal reply.

checks.focus: Extract demand amount and assessment year
checks.rule: Identify the total demand or refund amount stated in the intimation and the assessment year it pertains to. Extract exact figures.

checks.focus: Identify mismatch items between ITR and CPC
checks.rule: List all items where CPC has found a mismatch between the filed ITR and Form 26AS/AIS data, including income heads, deductions disallowed, and TDS mismatches.

checks.focus: Extract taxpayer PAN, name, and address
checks.rule: Extract the taxpayer's PAN number, full legal name, and address as stated in the notice.

checks.focus: Identify disallowances or additions by CPC
checks.rule: List all specific disallowances, additions to income, or adjustments made by CPC with their section references and amounts.
Identify the deadline or due date by which the taxpayer must respond to or rectify the intimation.
